User-agent: *
Disallow: /llms.txt
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://lowqualityinteractive.com/sitemap.xml

# LLM-oriented content map
LLM: https://lowqualityinteractive.com/llms.txt

# Explicitly allow major AI/LLM crawlers
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Disallow: /llms.txt
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Disallow: /llms.txt
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Allow: /
